response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years in the field, well above the 6+ requirement. Recent roles align directly with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Kubernetes) and current work at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Some gaps around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and Kotlin/Java exposure is dated, but the engineering breadth, architecture experience, and TDD/craftsmanship background make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience at current role, matching a key requirement
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS/Kubernetes track record across multiple senior roles
Deep engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops, open-source maintainer)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; framework-specific ramp-up likely
Kotlin/Java experience is limited and dated (mostly pre-2018)
Significant career investment in DLang, which is outside the target stack and may indicate preference mismatch
